title: Immersive Interfaces - Sophisticated Backpacks & Storage
description: This texture pack adds support for Sophisticated Backpacks & Storage, matching its design with the look and feel of Immersive Interfaces.
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/immersive-interfaces-mod-support-unofficial) ### Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial This texture pack adds special compatibility with Sophisticated Backpacks & Storage Mod, integrating its grooves into the aesthetics of Immersive Interfaces. ### Before: ![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93394d4e61fad6b2825c4382b8591c98e02e9d3b.png) ### After: ![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b667412bf2bcb55359f06632f7c3cc7984ccb6a4.png)
